text: In the first scene, I feel like an observer, slightly separated from the group in the conference room beyond the glass. The clear boundary between inside and outside makes me reflect on the nature of participation and exclusion. In the second scene, surrounded by vibrant colors and bold statements about "R+D," I sense a surge of curiosity and inspiration. The space seems to celebrate exploration and innovation, beckoning me to ponder how I, too, might contribute to human knowledge.
